text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ardan, Yaeno, thank you so much for today!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I still can't believe you threw me a birthday
party...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
How could we not, for the birthday of someone
so dear to us? I'm glad you enjoyed it. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Do forgive the cake being... well, not very
flavorsome.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Yes... The western sweets available at stores are
much more sweet, but...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Whenever Ardan or I make something from
scratch, it seems to turn out bland...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
N-no, not at all! I could tell you both put a lot of
love into it—really, the cake was delicious!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Plus, if we want a sweeter cake, why don't we
make one with the three of us?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, well... You are a skilled chef when it comes to
all things sweet, so we might have to take you up
on that offer.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Great! As they say, "Two's company, three's for
cake!"

text_block_list.name: Ardan & Yaeno
text_block_list.text: (I think I get it? Or maybe not...)
